title: luteola complicata
intro: Luteola complicata, also known as bitterweed, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its bitter-tasting leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Luteola complicata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Luteola complicata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses.
